6712accaf1cce.script:
walk:
    speech:
        button: "y"
        icon: "self"
        message:
            - "Good Evening traveller, have you ever seen a signpost talk directly to you before? well now you have!"
            - "It's very scary isn't it? Hows your day been? I hope you're doing well! Well anyway, you better be off hunting or something. GOOD EVENING!"
    audio:

        soundId: "speech_menu_01"
        loop: false
